sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68506" key="monognwmoniko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονο-γνωμονικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n68506.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">self-willed</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:222" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">222</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:235" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">235</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
